cultural_notes.free_notes: French toast is a Western brunch staple elevated here to premium restaurant level. The kilim textile backdrop is doing cultural grounding work: 'this is not a generic brunch restaurant — this is Najdi.' The sauce pour shot is a technically demanding food photography skill that signals professional-grade kitchen confidence. Rose petals scattered on the plate is a distinctly Saudi/Arabic garnish choice.
